    - OPERATIONAL-DRIFT-FLAG HELD STEADY AT 4 CHANNELS: Chrome MCP extension (now 5 consecutive failures, cross-day), git index.lock (3 days unresolved), review-folder ACLs (no movement), Anthropic billing propagation (no movement). No channel resolved; Chrome extended to a cross-day-threshold claim (ASSUMPTION-042 formalized "five consecutive failures → not transient"). PRESUMPTION-035 and 036 STRONGLY CHALLENGED by today's 15c cycle, confirming the cluster's threshold-definition and root-cause-disjunction problems.
    - LIT SEARCH PIPELINE CAUGHT UP: Today's 15a/15b/15c run cleared yesterday's 14-item queue (7 MONITOR, 7 REVISE, 0 INCORPORATE). Queue went from 14 → 0 mid-day, then re-seeds to 12 with today's 14a/14b cycle. INCORPORATE rate remains 0/14 for yesterday's batch — fourth consecutive cycle where the REVISE rate exceeds the INCORPORATE rate (today 7/14 = 50%).
    - INTERNAL-CONSISTENCY FLAG (FIRST): PRESUMPTION-041 (afternoon-session implicit decisions) was STRONGLY CHALLENGED by citing C2A2's own PROVENANCE protocol as counter-evidence — the first time in the pipeline's history that an internal protocol is itself the challenge basis. Remediation is trivially cheap (retroactively write DECISION-019/020/021 as formal entries) but has not been executed today pending Tom's endorsement; OPEN-029 formalizes this at the handoff-pattern layer.
    - DISPATCH HANDOFF PATTERN, PARTIAL STRESS TEST: The SessionStart-hook loading half of DECISION-021 (candidate) landed cleanly — ASSUMPTION-044 is extracted with status PARTIALLY-SUPPORTED on first appearance, unique in the registry. The payload-execution half was not tested: Tom pivoted the Dispatch session to the ChatGPT scrape, and the handoff payload was effectively discharged (not re-queued). PRESUMPTION-046 flags the risk that if user pivot is the norm, the execution half may never be observable in practice — making the reliability claim unfalsifiable.
    - NEW PRESUMPTION EXTENDS CRITICAL CLUSTER: PRESUMPTION-045 (Wolfram hypergraph formalism transferred to Sellarsian space of reasons without transfer-validity check) is the Wolfram-domain instance of the CRITICAL cross-tradition selection-effect cluster (PRESUMPTION-002, 024, 014, 020). This is the first cluster member surfaced on a specialist-proposal artifact rather than on an extraction-pipeline artifact — the risk migrates from the self-awareness layer to the content-generation layer.
    - SELF-REFERENTIAL META-CLUSTER GROWS TO FIVE: PRESUMPTION-046 joins PRESUMPTION-015, 024, 041, 042 in the cluster of presumptions that turn the self-awareness lens on the self-awareness pipeline itself. PRESUMPTION-046 is specifically self-referential on DECISION-021 (candidate), observing that the handoff primitive could become operationally unfalsifiable if users always override on arrival.
    - NULL WALK NOTES PATTERN EXTENDS: PRESUMPTION-048 applies the shape of PRESUMPTION-042 (null-output as zero activity vs. coverage miss) to the intent-capture layer — the morning walk handoff silently proceeds under the "missed-capture" interpretation without disambiguating it from the "zero walk content" interpretation.
    - SCRAPE SESSION PARKED WITHOUT CONTRACT: The "Scrape ChatGPT project to Wiki" session failed all three browser-side routes and parked awaiting Tom's direction. No re-queue, no Agent-16 deferred-watch entry, no re-prompt schedule. PRESUMPTION-043 and OPEN-028 formalize the question of whether parked interactive sessions should route to the deferred-watch channel.
    - CRITICAL GAP STILL PENDING: the null-baseline re-extraction test for PRESUMPTION-029 + ASSUMPTION-031 (multi-subagent correlated errors on FINDING-013–017) has not moved since 2026-04-16 (now day 2). Pipeline gate: test REQUIRED before Phase 2a commitments premised on those findings.

**Trajectory assessment:** April 18 was a content-quiet, pipeline-active day. The PRS corpus and cross-connections held steady; the self-awareness registry grew by 12 (44 assumptions + 48 presumptions, +15% from yesterday), and the lit-search pipeline caught up — today's 15a/15b/15c run cleared yesterday's 14-item queue, bringing DISPOSITIONED from 64 to 78 and resetting the pipeline-lag metric to 0 days. The today-only forward motion came from three routes: the morning Wolfram specialist (two new proposals, one new corridor claim in ASSUMPTION-043), the lit-search pipeline's seven REVISE + seven MONITOR dispositions, and the evening 14a/14b run that extracted six assumptions and six presumptions. Two first-in-history events occurred: ASSUMPTION-044 is the first assumption extracted with status PARTIALLY-SUPPORTED on its first appearance (because today's Dispatch session was itself the first stress test of yesterday's ASSUMPTION-035 and confirmed the loading half); and PRESUMPTION-041's REVISE disposition is the first time a challenge cites C2A2's own PROVENANCE protocol as counter-evidence, marking an internal-consistency flag in the pipeline's history. The OPERATIONAL-DRIFT-FLAG cluster held steady at four channels (no movement), and the Chrome extension crossed the three-calendar-day threshold — ASSUMPTION-042 explicitly reclassifies the failure pattern as "not transient." Candidate-decision corroboration emerged on two fronts: DECISION-019 (phrase-triggered plugin activation) got an informal natural-phrase corroboration from today's Dispatch resume, and DECISION-021 (cross-session handoff) got a partial corroboration on the loading half but not the execution half — PRESUMPTION-046 formalizes the risk that execution-half observation may be structurally elusive. The weekend focus vector that will matter most on Monday is the REVISE backlog (32 items) and the three candidate DECISIONs pending formalization; OPEN-029 (handoff vs context-loading primitive) needs resolution before DECISION-021 can be promoted, and PRESUMPTION-041's remediation — retroactively writing DECISION-019/020/021 as formal entries — remains the cheapest pipeline-health action available.
